memory.summary: My team just invited me to lunch, and since relationships matter most, I'll join them even though it delays my assignment.

desires: Ensure my teammates feel valued and included during lunch to maintain our high trust and closeness, even if it pushes my assignment work later.
Protect my future sleep discipline by strictly limiting the lunch duration so I can recover from my 2-hour sleep debt before tomorrow's long planning horizon tasks.
Avoid the stress of a rushed evening by negotiating a realistic extension on the assignment deadline rather than sacrificing my health or relationships for a 'soft' task.
Reinforce my boundary as an assertive person by explicitly stating my need to leave the group at a specific time, ensuring I don't drift into over-commitment.

goals.description: Join cohort_3 for lunch immediately to honor our high trust and closeness, ensuring the group feels valued.
goals.rationale: My value_priorities place relationships (0.5) far above academic tasks (0.15). As an assertive person, I will actively choose this connection now rather than passively letting it slip.

goals.description: Assertively set a hard stop time for the meal (e.g., 60 minutes max) and announce it at the start of the gathering.
goals.rationale: I am deliberate with a long planning horizon; protecting my sleep discipline is non-negotiable for future performance. Asserting this boundary now prevents resentment later.

goals.description: Postpone the 'soft' assignment analysis and reading until after the meal, but explicitly negotiate a realistic extension if the delay threatens tomorrow's focus.
goals.rationale: While the task is due soon, its 'soft' nature allows flexibility. Sacrificing health or relationships for a low-stakes task contradicts my core values. I will address the deadline proactively rather than rushing.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances relationship priority (0.5) by joining cohort_3 immediately, honoring our high trust. I will assertively propose a 60-minute boundary to protect my sleep discipline and long-term planning horizon, ensuring the meal doesn't compromise my future focus.
